status: exact finite fixed-word policy restriction of the pinned non-x degenerate-site graph; not a legality, availability, or far-secant certificate

first.checker_revision_note: same mathematical checker before adding self-hash capture and removing one unused import; pre-instrumentation source sha256 1bedf2a121d817520431d9e2d45bb7c63b60ae6c6346a01b4d3504dd92523b38

semantic_repeat_canonicalization.operation: parse JSON; delete checker, elapsed_seconds, and maximum_resident_set_raw; encode with sort_keys=true and separators=(',',':')
semantic_repeat_canonicalization.scope_note: this is exact equality of the mathematical payload across an instrumentation-only checker revision, not a claim of same-revision raw-byte identity

fixed_policy.definition: for each of the 124 parent steps, select the first cached whole word whose proper interiors have pairwise-distinct (y,z) fibres and avoid the two endpoint fibres; endpoint fibres may coincide with each other

exact_edge_semantics.candidate_sets: C_s is the union of all proper interior sites over the full pinned domain D_s
exact_edge_semantics.word_data: I_s(w) is the full proper-interior set and P_s(w)=((t_j,c_j))_j is the ordered child-step/prefix-control list of one whole cached word
exact_edge_semantics.edge_set: E_s(w) contains ((s,x),(t_j,M(x-c_j))) exactly when x is in C_s minus I_s(w) and M(x-c_j) is in C_(t_j)
exact_edge_semantics.fixed_policy_graph: E(sigma)=union_s E_s(sigma_s); every selected word activates all of its ordered slots jointly
exact_edge_semantics.correlation_guarantee: no slot or interior-avoidance fact from one word is combined with a slot from another word at the same source occurrence

canonical_step_1_two_cycle_test.exact_conclusion: the displayed two-cycle is an arbitrary-switching artifact: no single step-1 word supports both directions, and it can be broken without selecting a word that contains either carried site

strict_potential.definition: r(v) is the maximum number of policy edges from v to a sink

conditional_continuous_nonx_bound.condition: only for a non-x line that poisons a candidate site at every synchronized stitch while this fixed word is the actual selected legal action

fixed_word_MILP_or_CP_SAT: Use one binary y_(s,w) for each eligible whole-word class and impose sum_w y_(s,w)=1 for every step s.
Use an integer potential 0<=r_v<=|C|-1 for every vertex v=(s,x).
For every exact edge (u,v) in E_s(w), impose r_u >= r_v+1-|C|(1-y_(s,w)).
A feasible assignment is exactly a fixed whole-word policy whose induced direction-blind graph admits the displayed strict potential.
exact_feasibility_formulation.sound_word_class_quotient: For a combined safety test, merge words only when their exact (I_s(w),P_s(w)) data and every retained x-projection or legality predicate agree. Exact E_s(w) equality alone is a valid quotient only for this isolated acyclicity objective; it may erase ordering or geometry needed elsewhere. A class is atomic: choosing it activates all slots of one member signature together.
cycle_CEGAR: Start from one eligible whole word per step and build its exact graph.
For a found directed cycle e_1,...,e_k, let b_i=sum_{w:e_i in E_s(w)} y_(s,w); one-hot choice makes b_i Boolean.
Add the exact cycle cut sum_i b_i<=k-1, re-solve, and rebuild the exact graph.
Finite termination with an acyclic exact graph yields the potential; exhaustion proves the chosen eligibility restrictions cannot break every cycle.
exact_feasibility_formulation.allowed_subset_variant: Replace y by inclusion variables z_(s,w), require at least one included class per step, and enforce the potential implication for every included class. This certifies acyclicity under arbitrary switching among allowed whole words, but without a survivor/cardinality or state-coverage constraint the singleton solution is vacuous for availability.
exact_feasibility_formulation.state_dependent_extension: A genuine safety policy needs y_(q,w) on the correlated ordered-path/x-occupancy state q and graph vertices carrying q; selected-action successor closure must be checked. Per-slot variables are unsound because they splice incompatible words.

proved: the canonical step-1 two-cycle has no one-word realization
the deterministic 124-word intrinsic-projection-compatible pilot induces an exact acyclic direction-blind compatibility graph
the emitted height-two integer potential decreases on every one of the 1321 exact policy edges
whole-word correlations and the full-domain candidate-site universe are retained
not_proved: that the fixed word for a step is legal in every translated chronological environment
that any fixed word remains globally empty-fibre compatible with the evolving x-projection occupancy
positive connector availability after imposing this policy restriction
a state-dependent greatest fixed point or reachability closure
control of nondegenerate selector edges beyond the existing finite selector bound
control of empty-effect intervals and later re-entry, unrelated cursor jumps, newly born lines, or endpoint/deep-deep poisoning
an unconditional far-secant lemma or Erdős #193 theorem
strongest_obstruction: Acyclicity becomes easy when the menu is collapsed to one word per step, but exact legality and the no-new-x condition depend on the entire evolving translated prefix. The same fixed word can be blocked at another occurrence of the same step. Unless a correlated state-dependent policy retains at least one globally legal action and closes its successors, this DAG is a geometric pilot rather than a usable construction policy.
